definition.protocol: For each ranking and top-k group subset, train a new MLP from scratch using only the selected original input columns; evaluate on validation.
definition.k0: k=0 is represented by a mean-y_train predictor, no MLP is trained.
definition.reference_full: mae_full_ref is computed using the saved original baseline model.keras on validation.
definition.partial_auc_20_80: AUC over fraction_kept in [0.20, 0.80], normalized by interval width.
definition.column_order: Selected columns are sorted in original flattened order, flat=s*W+w.
